user.title: Add Hikvision recorder
user.description: Enter the recorder connection settings used by Home Assistant to reach the Hikvision NVR or DVR. Use a local IP address or DNS name reachable from Home Assistant. Leave Verify SSL disabled when the recorder uses a self-signed certificate. Use an HTTPS port only when HTTPS is enabled on the recorder.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Hikvision recorder
reconfigure.description: Update the recorder connection settings without removing the integration entry. Use this when the host, port, protocol, or credentials have changed. Keep the same recorder reachable from Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the recorder or complete Hikvision digest authentication.
error.already_configured: Another entry already uses this host and port.

init.title: Debug options
init.description: Enable targeted debug categories for troubleshooting. Use a comma-separated list. Example: playback, isapi, websocket
